title: Dead Man's Switch: A Crypto Mystery
original_title: Dead Man's Switch: A Crypto Mystery
overview: A riveting cryptocurrency thriller unravels the story of a Canadian blockchain wizard who mysteriously died on his honeymoon in India and the fate of his investors' $200 million. Did it vanish into the digital void or does it remain locked away in password-protected accounts?
